  have h_aff_C : AffineIndependent ℝ ![C, C₁, C₂] := sorry
  refine ⟨h_aff_A, h_aff_B, h_aff_C, ?_⟩
  have h_eq : (⟨_, h_aff_A⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere = (⟨_, h_aff_B⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere ∧
              (⟨_, h_aff_A⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere = (⟨_, h_aff_C⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere := sorry
  rw [← h_eq.1, ← h_eq.2, Set.inter_self, Set.inter_self]
  have h_pos : 0 < (⟨_, h_aff_A⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.radius := (⟨_, h_aff_A⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere_radius_pos
  exact (two_le_cardinal_mk_sphere (⟨_, h_aff_A⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.center h_pos).trans (by rfl)

let t := (⟨_, affineIndependent_ABC⟩ : Triangle ℝ P)
  let t1 := (⟨_, affineIndependent_A₁B₁C₁⟩ : Triangle ℝ P)
  have : (EuclideanGeometry.circumsphere t).center = (EuclideanGeometry.circumsphere t).center := rfl
  have : dist B A₁ = dist C A₁ := BA₁_eq_A₁C
  have : dist C B₁ = dist A B₁ := CB₁_eq_B₁A
  have : dist A C₁ = dist B C₁ := AC₁_eq_C₁B
  obtain ⟨hAA₁A₂, hBB₁B₂, hCC₁C₂, h_inter⟩ := Mathlib.Archive.Imo.Imo2023P6.result affineIndependent_ABC equilateral_ABC A₁_mem_interior_ABC B₁_mem_interior_ABC C₁_mem_interior_ABC BA₁_eq_A₁C CB₁_eq_B₁A AC₁_eq_C₁B angle_BA₁C_add_angle_CB₁A_add_angle_AC₁B A₂_mem_inf_BC₁_CB₁ B₂_mem_inf_CA₁_AC₁ C₂_mem_inf_AB₁_BA₁ affineIndependent_A₁B₁C₁ scalene_A₁B₁C₁
  exact ⟨hAA₁A₂, hBB₁B₂, hCC₁C₂, h_inter⟩

have h_not_collinear_AA₁A₂ : ¬Collinear ℝ {A, A₁, A₂} := sorry
  have h_not_collinear_BB₁B₂ : ¬Collinear ℝ {B, B₁, B₂} := sorry
  have h_not_collinear_CC₁C₂ : ¬Collinear ℝ {C, C₁, C₂} := sorry
  let hA : AffineIndependent ℝ ![A, A₁, A₂] := affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear_set.mpr h_not_collinear_AA₁A₂
  let hB : AffineIndependent ℝ ![B, B₁, B₂] := affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear_set.mpr h_not_collinear_BB₁B₂
  let hC : AffineIndependent ℝ ![C, C₁, C₂] := affineIndependent_iff_not_collinear_set.mpr h_not_collinear_CC₁C₂
  use hA, hB, hC
  have h_coaxial : (⟨_, hA⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.center = (⟨_, hB⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.center ∧
                   (⟨_, hA⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.radius = (⟨_, hB⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.radius ∧
                   (⟨_, hA⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.center = (⟨_, hC⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.center ∧
                   (⟨_, hA⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.radius = (⟨_, hC⟩ : Triangle ℝ P).circumsphere.radius := sorry
  simp_rw [h_coaxial.1, h_coaxial.2.1, h_coaxial.2.2.1, h_coaxial.2.2.2, Set.inter_self]
  exact Cardinal.at_least_limit_of_infinite 2
